verdict: T-020: band positivity <=> rho*R_lead<1; at rho=1 -> R_lead<1, class-wide <=0.650 (T-018, K_floor<=T'<=13). rho*R_lead^class<=0.650<1 for every admissible competitor => second-cumulant off-diagonal bands positive CLASS-WIDE (extends Math428's 5 enumerated). Screening rho<=1 improves; beyond-2nd = SC-SCOPE thin. STRONG EVIDENCE, no tier flip.

claims.name: band_positive_iff_rho_Rlead_lt_1
claims.detail: (Delta F_est = Delta F_diag - rho*(1/4)sum W^2 B > 0 <=> rho*R_lead < 1, R_lead=[(1/4)sum W^2 B]/Delta F_diag; the band sign is governed by the single product rho*R_lead. Verified: >0 for product 0.5, <0 for 1.5, =0 at 1)

claims.name: rho1_classwide_Rlead_below_one
claims.detail: (at rho=1 the criterion is R_lead<1; T-018 gives R_lead(Q)=const*(1+K_floor)*I<=23.2*(1+13)*2e-3=0.6495<1 for EVERY admissible competitor (K_floor<=T'<=13 pin). So rho=1 bands positive class-wide, extending Math428's 5 enumerated readings to all admissible patterns)

claims.name: screening_resummation_improves
claims.detail: (rho=1/(1+g)=0.493<=1 for g=1.03>=0 (stable disordered parent, screening not anti-screening); rho*R_lead^class: rho=1 -> 0.650, screened -> 0.320, both <1. The resummation is a CREDIT; rho=1 is the conservative bound and already closes the class-wide second-cumulant stability)

claims.name: consistent_with_math428_enumerated
claims.detail: (Math428 explicit Bloch: the 5 enumerated readings have band min +6.7e-04>0 at rho=1, consistent with R_lead<1 there. This note's class bound R_lead^class<=0.650<1 covers the non-enumerated admissible patterns by the same criterion)

claims.name: quantitative_sanity_classwide
claims.detail: (criterion rho*R_lead<1; class-wide rho=1 product 0.650<1 (margin x1.54); anchored u_eff=2.685>0 + g=1.03>=0 (ROBUSTNESS-MU2). Beyond-second-cumulant third cumulant = SC-SCOPE (thin). Competitor class = crystallographic-shell subsets (operator item). No tier flip B1/B2 T6)
